ddls:
CREATE TABLE "facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "facility_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of facility */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district where the facility is located */,
  "block_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the block where the facility is located */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the facility */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the facility */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the facility */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the facility */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the facility's location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the facility's location */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date of facility registration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the facility (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the facility */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who updated the facility */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the facility was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the facility was updated */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the facility data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facilities_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facilities_block_id FOREIGN KEY ("block_id") REFERENCES blocks ("block_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facilities_facility_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_type_id") REFERENCES facility_types ("facility_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facility_types" (
  "facility_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the facility type */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the facility type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the district is located */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_districts_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blocks" (
  "block_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each block */,
  "block_name" TEXT /* Name of the block */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district where the block is located */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the block */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who updated the block */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the block was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the block was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("block_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_forms" (
  "form_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data form */,
  "form_name" TEXT /* Name of the data form */,
  "facility_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the facility type the form is designed for */,
  "form_description" TEXT /* Description of the data form */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the form is active or not */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the form */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who updated the form */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the form was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the form was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("form_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_forms_facility_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_type_id") REFERENCES facility_types ("facility_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "form_fields" (
  "field_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each form field */,
  "form_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the form the field belongs to */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the field */,
  "field_label" TEXT /* Label of the field (displayed to users) */,
  "field_type" TEXT /* Type of the field (e.g., text, select_one, select_multiple) */,
  "field_hint" TEXT /* Hint for the field */,
  "field_constraint" TEXT /* Constraint for the field */,
  "field_constraint_message" TEXT /* Message to display if the field constraint is violated */,
  "field_required" INTEGER /* Whether the field is required */,
  "field_appearance" TEXT /* Appearance of the field (e.g., minimal, full) */,
  "field_default" TEXT /* Default value for the field */,
  "field_relevant" TEXT /* Relevant condition for the field to be visible */,
  "field_read_only" INTEGER /* Whether the field is read-only */,
  "field_calculation" TEXT /* Calculation for the field */,
  "field_choice_filter" TEXT /* Choice filter for the field */,
  "dependency" TEXT /* Dependency of the field */,
  "dependency_value" TEXT /* Value of the dependency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("field_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_form_fields_form_id FOREIGN KEY ("form_id") REFERENCES data_forms ("form_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "form_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the facility the data is collected from */,
  "form_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the form used to collect the data */,
  "field_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the field the data belongs to */,
  "field_value" TEXT /* Value of the field */,
  "data_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was collected */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who collected the data */,
  "is_draft" INTEGER /* Whether the data is a draft or not */,
  "submission_status" TEXT /* Submission status of the data (e.g., submitted, pending, rejected) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the data */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who updated the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_form_data_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_form_data_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_form_data_form_id FOREIGN KEY ("form_id") REFERENCES data_forms ("form_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_form_data_field_id FOREIGN KEY ("field_id") REFERENCES form_fields ("field_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility related to the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
